hypothesis: Explicitly incorporating the total system charge as an input feature (and optionally learning per-atom partial charges) into E(3)-equivariant MLIP models will significantly improve energy and force MAEs and stabilize MD trajectories for charged systems (e.g., ionic solutions and protonated biomolecules) relative to charge-agnostic baselines trained on neutral SPICE-like data, enabling accurate end-to-end simulations of charged species.
